appointment_month: Month label for the appointment snapshot period.
appointment_month_start_date: Start date of the appointment reporting month.
gp_code: Practice code for the general practice organisation.
gp_name: Practice name for the general practice organisation.
hcp_type: Healthcare professional type who delivered the appointment.
appt_mode: Appointment mode such as Face-to-Face, Telephone, Home Visit, or Video Conference/Online.
appt_status: Appointment status, including Attended or DNA.
national_category: National appointment category or consultation category.
time_between_book_and_appt: Time band between booking and appointment date.
count_of_appointments: Number of appointments in detailed geography tables.
total_appointments: Aggregated appointment count in summary tables.
